scripts.build:chrome: rm -rf manifest.json && cp chrome-manifest.json manifest.json  -f && rm -rf irh-plus-widget-chrome-vx.x.x.zip && zip -r irh-plus-widget-chrome-vx.x.x.zip *  -x ".git" -x "ff-manifest.json" -x "chrome-manifest.json"
scripts.build:firefox: rm -rf manifest.json && cp ff-manifest.json manifest.json -f && rm -rf irh-plus-widget-firefox-vx.x.x.xpi && zip -r irh-plus-widget-firefox-vx.x.x.xpi *  -x ".git" -x "ff-manifest.json" -x "chrome-manifest.json"
